user.title: Connect to Cloudflare Agent
user.description: Enter the URL and API key for your Cloudflare AI agent.

data_description.agent_url: The URL of your deployed Cloudflare agent (e.g. https://cf-ha-agent.your-account.workers.dev)
data_description.api_key: The API key configured on the Cloudflare agent (AGENT_API_KEY)
data_description.user_instructions: Additional instructions to include in every request to the AI

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the agent. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the API key and try again.
